title: CraftCommand / CraftD3K
description: Just /craft, with permissions and configurable messages. Craft via Command. Crafting-Command.
body:
![CraftD3K-Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cc6e673d7d854d5bf66f29070a654591e852e0e.png)

[![GitHub Repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-CraftD3K-181717?style=flat-square&logo=github)](https://github.com/madetv1280/CraftD3K)
![MC](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-26.1.x-62B47A?style=flat-square)
[![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Contact-me.madetv1280.de-000000?style=flat-square)](https://me.madetv1280.de)
![Last Commit](https://img.shields.io/github/last-commit/madetv1280/CraftD3K?style=flat-square)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/MIT_License-181717?logo=github)

Opens the crafting table with `/craft`!

**Lightweight `/craft` plugin with permission support**


- Opens the crafting table GUI with `/craft` or `/c` anywhere.  
- Simple install, ready to use immediately.  
- Optional: permission control and cooldown.

---
![ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53ff4b5da83db273b4b6d262a675db30d70ba671_0.webp)![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2e21609d6b47e2bcda458e8bb30e67ae7c493bd.png)
- Minecraft 1.21.x (Paper / Purpur / Spigot / Bukkit)  
- Bukkit-compatible permission systems  
- Recommended: [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/)

---
![ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86441a0a1396f482704c5f48f41c1f211e7b35e8.png)![Author](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2805243c8ad9ec47958070122f7a6fff9cce354e.png)

- Created by [`madetv1280`](https://solo.to/madetv1280)  
- License: MIT  
- Support: via Modrinth or Solo.to

---
![ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bc74fcfb1f4e6f03d08a360c2bcd720eb77657d.png)![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eebb45361a4b4e1d2d2fe85f6480bf8951e00d23.png)

1. Place `CraftD3K-x.x.x-xxx.jar` into your server’s `/plugins` folder.  
2. Restart your server.  
3. Done! Players can now use `/craft`.

---
![ico](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0bdc6b78d5a90fd40b9904e82b63e417a9ae5277.png)![Permissions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68d8f2869a17e5225119bdc407db220db57a8719.png)

By default, everyone can use `/craft`.  
Use a permissions plugin (like LuckPerms) to restrict access:

| Command             | Description                   | Permission                | Default |
|---------------------|-------------------------------|---------------------------|---------|
| `/craft` or `/c`    | Opens crafting GUI            | `crafd3k.craft.use`              | ✅ yes  |
| `/craftreload`      | Reloads plugin config         | `craftd3k.reload.use`           | OP only |
| `None`      | Skips cooldown         | `craftd3k.bypass.cooldown`           | No |


All messages can be edited in `messages.yml`.

---

Open Source - /craft Plugin - Java Edition - Modrinth
